title: Bury Me Dead
writer: Dwight V. Babcock, Karen DeWolf, Irene Winston
actors: Cathy O'Donnell, June Lockhart, Hugh Beaumont
plot: Barbara Carlin attends her own funeral and returns home suspecting that her husband, Rod Carlin, had tried to do away with her, and is also (rightfully) curious as to just who was the woman buried under her name. She learns that t...
